name: Sorcerer's Servant
short_description: A strategy-focused roguelike deckbuilding spinning RPG where you fight with slots and items. Choose items, build a deck, and chain them to evolve. When the chain is long enough, you can obtain items and equip them. As her assistant, you support the sorceress. Her fate lies beyond the reels.
detailed_description:
Spin the slots to build.
As her assistant, help weave her fate.

This is a deck-building roguelike where you spin the reels to build your deck, chain items and evolve them, let her to equip them, to defeat monsters.

As the loyal attendant to a mysterious sorceress, you will help her grow stronger.

  • By gathering and chaining items in slots, you can create powerful synergies, enhance her abilities, and upgrade to even stronger gear.

  • Earn gold from battles to purchase useful items in the shop, then equip her before venturing into the forest to gain an advantage.  

At first, you might struggle and fall quickly, unable to progress far.
But depending on your strategy and the enhancements from collected special items, you’ll gradually push deeper into the adventure.

One basic strategy is to strengthen her defensive gear while enemies are still weak.

However, as the stages progress, finding your own strategy becomes key, and you will discover an addictive cycle of challenge as you advance through the story.

Your strategy and luck will decide her fate—lead her to victory and break the curse that binds her!
